events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating the iconic riffs and astronomical talent of Brian May as he turns 79. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman, Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever, kicking off with that iconic Buggles track. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century and counting for Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and vital today. What's your stand-out track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love, Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the muddy fields of Woodstock became a beacon of peace, love, and three days of music. Imagine being there!

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the King of Rock & Roll, passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year, having been born on January 8, 1935.

angles.name: King's Legacy
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and influence are as strong as ever. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, a pivotal figure in hip-hop, was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55 this year, born June 16, 1971.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Thirty years since the world lost a voice that defined a generation. Remembering the enduring impact of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970. Born on November 27, 1942, he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Over five decades since his passing, Jimi Hendrix's revolutionary guitar work still inspires. His legacy remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Still walking that crossing, still spinning those tracks.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the powerhouse that is Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking, still inspiring. What's your favourite Pretenders tune?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester, England.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Biblical! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate with its message of peace and unity.

events.title: Apple's first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple first announced the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed how we listened to music forever. Who remembers their first one?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Time to celebrate the world's most famous secret agent. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the comedic genius of John Cleese as he turns 87! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British institution.
